description: Composition Grey T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves with graphic and rubber print on the chest and brand tab appliquéd above the left hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry normal or line dry Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Vintage styling on this classic T-shirt is a sure fire way of upping your style statement in your off-duty ensembles. This tee from locomotive is crafted from soft cotton to offer exemplary comfort which, along with its fashionable styling, makes this a great addition to your wardrobe. Pair it with form fitting denims and casual shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
